title: Sanity check / base case: agreement with valuated matroid duality for U_{n,n}

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
For the Boolean matroid $U_{n,n}$ (so $\Trop U_{n,n}=\mathbf{P}(\overline{\mathbb R}^n)$ and
$S^\perp=S^c$), the constructed $\Phi$ should coincide with classical **valuated matroid duality**
sending a rank-$k$ valuated matroid to its rank-$(n-k)$ dual, which is the order-reversing involution
on tropical linear subspaces of $\mathbf{P}(\overline{\mathbb R}^n)$ mentioned in the motivation.

Establishing this agreement (a) validates the general construction, and (b) pins down the correct
sign/scaling conventions in the definition $\theta'(F):=\theta(F^\perp)$. This is testable
numerically for small $n$. While a "sanity check," demonstrating consistency with the known
$U_{n,n}$ duality is needed to confirm the construction is the intended one and not a different map.
